slots.caption_ig:
From Bushwick to Burlingame. The best dish in every neighborhood. Walking or driving distance. Right now in Philly, SF, Oakland, NYC. Free iOS beta.

#ForkFox #BayAreaEats #PhillyEats #NYCFood #DishNotRestaurant
slots.caption_fb: Every neighborhood has a #1. We've scored dishes in Bushwick. In Burlingame. In Fishtown, the Mission, Oakland's Fruitvale, North Philly, Sunset. Open the app, drop a pin, get the dish — by walking or driving distance, your call.
slots.video_gen_prompt: Vertical 9:16 video, 9 seconds. Animated map zoom: starts on NYC at night, swoops to Philly, swoops to SF Bay. Red pins drop in each city. Final pin expands to a dish photo. End frame: 'From Bushwick to Burlingame.' with 'Burlingame' in red.
